case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS CVFERRIGNO IND/DBA 3822 19TH ST. APTS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,096.05 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT CVFERRIGNO IND/DBA 3822 19TH ST. APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-14-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CVFERRIGNO IND/DBA 3822 19TH ST. APTS.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CVFERRIGNO IND/DBA 3822 19TH ST. APTS. $1,096.05 PRINCIPAL, $14.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.84, REQUEST FOR AWARD OF FILING FEE DENIED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CVFERRIGNO IND/DBA 3822 19TH ST. APTS.
